recent_form_summary: Unbeaten all tournament, beat Zarazua, Parry, Badosa, and Eala 6-2 6-4 in the semifinal, first-ever grass final.
stat_trend_summary: Hit 9 aces vs Eala on 83% first-serve points won -- serve clicking well on grass this week, though earlier-round values weren't found.
opponent_factor_summary: Pegula is a very disciplined returner and leads their only grass meeting; a tougher return test than her earlier rounds could moderate ace output.
notes: Only one confirmed match value (9 vs Eala) despite four matches played, but no signs of struggle -- clean, ace-friendly serving this week against a high 6.5 line.
